query: Restructure the pipeline to first generate a base image with Flux, then use the inpainted region as a condition for ControlNet-driven style transfer to the entire image, effectively merging the two branches.

desired.outcome: A unified workflow where the base Flux generation is followed by inpainting, then the inpainted region is used as a conditioning input to ControlNet style transfer applied to the full image, yielding a coherent stylized composite.
desired.quality: All original modules (inpainting, compositing, style transfer, ControlNet) are retained and rewired logically; no dangling connections; preview outputs are preserved; the original compositing or masking stages are either integrated or replaced cleanly to achieve the merged pipeline.

_tags.author_rationale: This query forces the agent to deeply understand both the inpainting/compositing and ControlNet/style-transfer paths and redesign their interaction, which is the most agentic and specific structural change possible for this workflow.
